mapper.sql: id, teaching_id, assistant_id, teacher_id, create_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_teaching_assistant(teaching_id, assistant_id, teacher_id, create_time, del_flag) values (#{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{assistantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_teaching_assistant
teaching_id,
assistant_id,
teacher_id,
create_time,
del_flag,

mapper.update:
update biz_teaching_assistant
teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
assistant_id = #{assistantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_teaching_assistant set teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, assistant_id = #{assistantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
